title: Separate Donaldson scripture quotation from actual commentary at the corpus/build layer so Donaldson stops echoing the verse text back as commentary
Upgrade result/morsel navigation to be paragraph-first across available source corpora
Improve ranking toward deep links
Add word-side translation/etymology hooks
Expand browser regression coverage
Add an append-only immutable task ledger and worker-ready orchestration format
Split source periodicals and large historical corpora into natural paragraph-addressed browse units so every result can open its full parent document at the relevant paragraph
Replace heuristic source-doc resolution with stable doc and paragraph IDs in the scripture-side word/graph artifacts so cross-corpus jumps stay exact after future corpus changes

Rebuild scripture-side critical-word coverage so semantically rich verse terms like loved, breath, life, and soul surface deeper paragraph-level links instead of disappearing from the interactive graph
Add non-Bible word-study fallbacks for Book of Mormon, Doctrine and Covenants, and Pearl of Great Price so clicked words there still surface translation/gloss context without Strong's data
Add mobile quick-back and cross-corpus regression coverage so swipe-back and history restoration are tested the same way traversal is tested
Add source-collection intermediate groupings in the TOC for very large corpora so periodicals browse by year/volume before issue tiles
Split source periodicals and large historical corpora into natural paragraph-addressed browse units so every result can open its full parent document at the relevant paragraph
Promote stable doc/paragraph IDs into the channel payload itself so client navigation no longer needs label-based fallback resolution
Replace heuristic source-doc resolution with stable doc and paragraph IDs in the scripture-side word/graph artifacts so cross-corpus jumps stay exact after future corpus changes
Add scripture lexical fallback in chapter word indexes so clicked words can surface standard-work verses before commentary when the semantic graph is thin
Widen the lexical scripture-fallback rebuild across the remaining standard works so underlines and scripture-first results are consistent outside John, Genesis, and Moses
Fix the Enuma Elish source artifact so it uses clean readable English text instead of the current wrong-language rendering

Repair leaked escaped critical-word markup in scripture chapter HTML by re-annotating from clean verse text instead of mutated inline wrappers
Repair leaked escaped critical-word markup in Doctrine and Covenants chapters by re-annotating from clean verse text instead of mutated inline wrappers
Extend clean verse-text re-annotation to the remaining scripture books with leaked escaped critical-word wrappers, staging them in book-safe slices
Restore and clean the Gospel of John chapter HTML from canonical scripture text, then re-annotate critical words to remove leaked escaped wrappers and truncation
Restore and clean Genesis chapter HTML from canonical scripture text, then re-annotate critical words as the next safe book slice
